title: Paid Advertising
description: Hyper-scalable campaigns on Meta, Google, and TikTok. We design performance creatives, optimize ad funnels, and surgically allocate budgets to yield maximum direct return on spend.

title: Web Analytics & Tracking
description: Server-side tracking, custom GA4 architectures, and pixel audits. We establish robust attribution loops, allowing you to accurately track conversions despite modern privacy blockers.

title: Marketing Strategy
description: End-to-end positioning blueprints for DTC and high-growth retail brands. We diagnose unit economics, plan creative testing schedules, and formulate sustainable scale guides.

title: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)
description: Data-backed landing page design, user session analysis, and rigorous A/B testing. We turn traffic leaks into checkout conversions to instantly decrease your CPA.
